april_2026_row_values.narrative_columns: All 8 narrative columns are EMPTY for April 2026.

verdict: Safe to delete. Narrative columns are empty (they were always intended to live in the PCG Word doc). Count values can be re-derived from Sales Register via COUNTIFS / SUMIFS. The Sales Register has 128 rows with Sales Status set — fully sufficient to reproduce these counts.
